Pleasant, clean bathrooms and very good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21KTkxUYzFPVXAzVlVJME1uZFZhMDF6UzFFeFlsRRAB

reviews.comment:
La promo del combo 7500 es un fraude, la carne la buscas con lupa, el pan viejo y no tenían ni lechuga. Es preferible que no la ofrezcan o avisen de qué se trata. Encima esperarlas una eternidad y la mala cara de la empleada a la que consulte

(Translated by Google)
The 7500 combo deal is a scam. You have to look for the meat with a magnifying glass, the bread is stale, and they didn't even have lettuce. They'd be better off not offering it at all or at least explaining what it is. On top of that, the wait was endless, and the employee I asked was incredibly rude.

reviewReply.comment: Buenas tardes , lamentamos lo sucedido. pero usted fue a otra Estacion , ahi el combo esta ese precio) Nosotros nos encontramos en el km 210 somos ACA Dolores  Esperamos su visita. Saludos

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2taWGJtMW5OREo1Vnkwd01uVkpiblp5WkVoRU1XYxAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. No informan del comedor que hay en el fondo. Gravisimo error. Se cone Excelente y a muy buen precio

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. They don't mention the dining area in the back. A serious oversight. The food is excellent and very reasonably priced.

reviews.comment:
Muy buen ambiente,  la atención excelente.  Pedimos menú apto para celíacos,  estaban muy informados y tomaron todos los recaudos necesarios.

(Translated by Google)
Great atmosphere, excellent service. We asked for a gluten-free menu; they were very knowledgeable and took all the necessary precautions.
